zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Higgins II於1681年9月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦時，他的父親Benjamin Higgins Sr.41歲，母親Lydia Bangs40歲。他於1693年6月17日與Mary Abraham在英國艾可易亞斯特 漢姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1730年在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦被列為juryman - county court。他去世於1761年5月11日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin Higgins II于1681年9月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦时，他的父亲Benjamin Higgins Sr.41岁，母亲Lydia Bangs40岁。他于1693年6月17日与Mary Abraham在英国艾可易亞斯特 漢姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1730年在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦被列为juryman - county court。他去世于1761年5月11日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Higgins II was born on 15 September 1681, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Benjamin Higgins Sr., was 41 and his mother, Lydia Bangs, was 40. He married Mary Abraham on 17 June 1693, in East Ham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1730, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as juryman - county court in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States. He died before 11 May 1761, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin Higgins II est né le 15 septembre 1681, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Benjamin Higgins Sr., avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lydia Bangs, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Mary Abraham le 17 juin 1693, à East Ham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1730, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est juryman - county court à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Il est décédé avant 11 mai 1761, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benjamin Higgins II am 15. September 1681 in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Benjamin Higgins Sr. 41 und seine Mutter Lydia Bangs 40. Er hat am 17. Juni 1693 in East Ham, Essex, England Mary Abraham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1730, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als juryman - county court in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb vor 11. Mai 1761 in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Higgins II è nato il il 15 settembre 1681 nel Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Benjamin Higgins Sr., aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lydia Bangs, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Mary Abraham il 17 giugno 1693, nel East Ham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1730, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come juryman - county court nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì prima del 11 maggio 1761, nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Benjamin Higgins IIが1681年9月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムで生まれた時，父Benjamin Higgins Sr.は41歳，母Lydia Bangsは40歳であった。1693年6月17日にイギリスエセックスエアスト ハムでMary Abrahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1730年，49歳の時，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムでの職業はjuryman - county courtと記録されている。彼は1761年5月11日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで死去した。

ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬
ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Higgins II(이)가 1681년 9월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benjamin Higgins Sr.(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lydia Bangs(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1693년 6월 17일 영국 에세스 이스트 함에서 Mary Abraham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1730년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 juryman - county court이었다. 그는 1761년 5월 11일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Higgins II nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1681, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Benjamin Higgins Sr., tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lydia Bangs, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Abraham em 17 de junho de 1693, em East Ham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1730, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como juryman - county court em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu antes 11 de maio de 1761, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Coloni: эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика

ru.Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial Amer: массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin Higgins II родился 15 сентября 1681 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Benjamin Higgins Sr. было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lydia Bangs, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Abraham 17 июня 1693 г. в местности эаст хам, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1730 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии juryman - county court в местности эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Он умер перед 11 май 1761 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benjamin Higgins II nació el 15 de septiembre de 1681, en Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Benjamin Higgins Sr., tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lydia Bangs, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Mary Abraham el 17 de junio de 1693, en East Ham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1730, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era juryman - county court en Eastham, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Murió antes de 11 de mayo de 1761, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
